name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's agentic coding tool that runs in the terminal, IDEs, desktop, and the web to read codebases, edit files, and run commands.

years.notes: Claude Code pixel-art critter mark — terracotta 8-bit creature with two eye cutouts, side arm bumps, and four legs. Hand-rendered on a 24×24 pixel grid using axis-aligned <rect> elements with shape-rendering="crispEdges" to preserve the pixel-art aesthetic at any size.
